ontology_relation_candidates.label: produced by
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates a product or product series to the entity that manufactures or produces it.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation is semantically stable, reusable across documents, and aligns with the product class in the seed ontology. It captures a common producer–product relationship that is meaningful beyond isolated mentions.

evidence.snippet: ( Super Smart ) series is a line of high - end Android - powered mobile devices produced by Samsung Electronics , a division of Samsung from South Korea . The series consisted initially of sm
